title: Just Enough Recipe Sharing (JERS)
description: A JEI addon which allows sharing recipes in chat
body:
If you want to put this mod in your modpack, feel free to use it :)

This mod allows sharing recipes from JEI in the chat.
Simply open the JEI view and press on the new share button to share any recipes ![Location of share button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NBckKpmw/images/51fd8fa17272e0b6c732eb980f5d9d0b2dbd7957.png) ![Shared recipes in chat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NBckKpmw/images/94ad352a199b90bf28ce0e91a31f8cbc292e362a.png)
